data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having success metrics tied to outcomes, but the evidence does not provide any concrete metrics or data that demonstrate this linkage. While the use case mentions success metrics, it lacks specific details or examples of how these metrics are defined or measured in relation to the outcomes of the actions taken. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided, as there is no confirmation that the requirement is covered.
gaps: No evidence of success metrics tied to outcomes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
